topic: noise envelope + quantum-RNG + universe-simulation 3-way collab subagent fusion — α absorbed-pool drives sim seeding selection / β quantum-RNG hardware feeds raw entropy / γ bridge expanded to sim-output paths / each subagent (rng-collab + sim-collab + noise-orchestrator) emits via raw 44 parent_sid streaming with originSessionID preservation; design unified architecture where noise envelope acts as multiplexer across 3 entropy domains (quantum hw / sim output / system csprng) with deterministic fallback ladder per source health.

gamma.payload_summary: bridge_pick=bridge_gaia invocation=tool/gaia_bridge.hexa (real fetch deferred to sub-agent or OFFLINE-FALLBACK)

intake.topic_summary: 사전 grounded 사실 (Bash ls/grep + Read 검증): tool/noise_envelope.hexa = 425 lines, tool/kick_dispatch.hexa = 1187 lines, tool/hive_parent_sid.hexa exists (opaque SID minter — 'kick-self-<unix>-<8hex>' shape, _mint() at :63). raw 44 parent_sid streaming wiring: kick_dispatch.hexa:901 reads HIVE_PARENT_SID env, :912 accepts --parent-sid flag, :1018-1029 auto-synthesizes 'auto-<slug>-<ts>-<pid>' when both unset (R4 fix). Registry: state/kick/registry/noise_sources/absorbed = 18 primitives, /bridges = 16 (gaia bridge slug=bridge_gaia, invocation tool/gaia_bridge.hexa, offline-fallback true), /qrng = 1 (anu_time slug=qrng_anu_time, kind=qrng, invocation sim_bridge/anu_time/universe.hexa, rate-limit 1 req/min, bytes-per-response 64, offline-fallback true). exec() calls in noise_envelope.hexa = 15. 본 cycle 은 위 facts 위에 (collab-orchestration / entropy-domain-multiplexer / sim-output-bridge-expansion) 3 axis 의 design-time spec 을 emit — 각 subagent 의 contract + 3-domain fallback ladder + sim-output bridge 후보 inventory + originSessionID preservation invariant. 본 cycle 은 design-only — 신규 .hexa 0건, 신규 .json witness 1건만 emit.

alpha_absorbed.applied_to_design: 흡수된 prior-tier1 = config-ts-port-roi 의 'noise_envelope_audit_chain' tier1 — α/β/γ envelope chain 의 audit 책임이 alpha 출처로 들어옴. 본 cycle 의 의미: α channel 자체가 '흡수된 audit-chain primitive' 를 내놓는 source 이니 sim-collab subagent 의 seeding selection 도 흡수된 primitive 의 trawl_id 을 그대로 사용 (즉 sim run 의 seed = absorbed_pick.byte_hash[0:8] hex prefix → uint32 → sim engine seed). audit-chain 패턴 동형: 매 sim-run 의 결과도 다시 absorbed primitive 로 흡수 가능 (recursive seeding) → fixpoint loop 형성.

beta_qrng.applied_to_design: byte 35 (0x23) → 3 axis mod 3 = 2 → axis_c (sim-output-bridge-expansion) 가 design-bias 후보. priority ordering 결정 — bias 그대로 따르지 않고 architectural impact 기준 axis_a (collab-orchestration = subagent contract 정의 = 모든 다른 axis 의 prerequisite) > axis_b (entropy-domain-multiplexer = 3-domain fallback ladder) > axis_c (sim-output-bridge expansion). KICK_BETA_REAL_ANU 미설정 → urandom-fallback 명시 (obs_2). 단 본 cycle 은 'qrng-collab subagent' 가 KICK_BETA_REAL_ANU=1 로 ANU API 실 fetch 를 책임지므로 urandom-fallback 이 'subagent 가 시작 안 된 상태' 의 정직한 surface.

gamma_bridge.payload_summary: bridge_pick=bridge_gaia invocation=tool/gaia_bridge.hexa (real fetch deferred to sub-agent or OFFLINE-FALLBACK)
gamma_bridge.applied_to_design: Gaia bridge 선택 (β-byte 35 mod 16 = 3 → arxiv/cmb/codata/gaia 알파벳 index 3) → Gaia DR3 = 1.8 billion stellar source 의 6D astrometry (RA/Dec/parallax/PMra/PMdec/RV) — '관측-driven catalog' 의 archetype. 본 cycle 의 sim-output bridge 와 의미적 대비: Gaia 는 '실제 우주의 측정' / sim-output 는 '시뮬레이션된 우주의 측정' — 양쪽 모두 (object_id, coordinates, attribute_with_error) 같은 record-shape. 즉 γ bridge 의 sim-output 확장은 Gaia 같은 catalog 가 '시뮬레이션된 catalog' (예: IllustrisTNG mock, MillenniumXXL halo catalog, Lattice QCD configuration ensemble) 로 동형 확장된 surface — bridge_kind enum 에 'sim_catalog' 추가만으로 확장 가능. OFFLINE-FALLBACK — Gaia DR3 실 fetch 는 sim-collab subagent 의 책임 (deferred).

falsifiers_preregistered.name: three-subagent-contracts-defined
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: rng-collab + sim-collab + noise-orchestrator 3 subagent 의 contract 명시: 각각 (name, role_one_line, inputs_required[], outputs_emitted[], exit_codes{}, parent_sid_handling, raw 44 compliance). 누락 1개 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: tier_1_promotions[].axis_collab_orchestration.subagent_contracts 의 rng_collab + sim_collab + noise_orchestrator 3 entry 모두 7-key 채움

falsifiers_preregistered.name: parent-sid-streaming-protocol-specified
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: raw 44 parent_sid streaming protocol 의 3-stage propagation (env HIVE_PARENT_SID → --parent-sid flag → auto-synth 'auto-<slug>-<ts>-<pid>') + originSessionID forwarding mechanism (parent emits, child preserves in own envelope payload, grand-child reads from child's envelope) 명시. propagation 단계 누락 또는 originSessionID 보존 mechanism 미정의 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: tier_1_promotions[].axis_collab_orchestration.parent_sid_streaming_protocol 의 propagation_stages[] (≥3) + origin_session_id_forwarding (key with mechanism str + invariant str) 채움

falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: propagation_stages length >= 3 AND origin_session_id_forwarding.mechanism != '' AND origin_session_id_forwarding.invariant != ''

falsifiers_preregistered.name: three-entropy-domain-fallback-ladder
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: 3 entropy domain (quantum hw / sim output / system csprng) 의 deterministic fallback ladder 명시: priority order + transition_criteria_per_step + steady_state_source. 3 domain 미열거 또는 transition criteria 누락 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: tier_1_promotions[].axis_entropy_domain_multiplexer.fallback_ladder 의 ladder_order[] (3 entry) + transition_criteria{}[] (각 transition 마다 trigger + fallback_target 명시)
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: ladder_order length == 3 AND ladder_order contains 'quantum_hw' AND 'sim_output' AND 'system_csprng' AND transition_criteria has >= 2 entries

falsifiers_preregistered.name: per-source-health-check-spec
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: 각 entropy source 의 health check function spec 명시: (a) quantum_hw → ANU rate-limit (1 req/min) + 5s curl --max-time + HTTP 200 check; (b) sim_output → output file mtime staleness threshold + checksum sanity; (c) system_csprng → /dev/urandom always-available (no health check needed; OS guarantee). 3 source 모두 (probe_method, success_criterion, failure_criterion, fallback_target) 4-tuple 명시. 누락 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: tier_1_promotions[].axis_entropy_domain_multiplexer.health_check_spec 의 quantum_hw + sim_output + system_csprng 3 entry 각각 4-tuple
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: health_check_spec has 3 keys AND each entry has probe_method AND success_criterion AND failure_criterion AND fallback_target

falsifiers_preregistered.name: sim-output-bridge-candidates-enumerated
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: γ bridge sim-output path 후보 ≥3 명시: 각 candidate 마다 (sim_name, output_artifact_kind, sample_record_shape, fetch_latency_estimate, license_or_access_note). 후보 < 3 또는 5-tuple 누락 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: candidate_bridges length >= 3 AND each entry has sim_name AND output_artifact_kind AND sample_record_shape AND fetch_latency_estimate AND license_or_access_note

falsifiers_preregistered.name: multiplexer-interface-backward-compatible
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: noise envelope multiplexer interface 가 기존 schema (mechanism, source_id, byte_hash, ts, payload_summary) preserve. 새 field (entropy_domain, source_health, origin_session_id) 는 OPTIONAL 추가 — 기존 sentinel parser 는 그대로 동작. backward compat 미명시 또는 기존 5 field schema 깨짐 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: tier_1_promotions[].axis_collab_orchestration.multiplexer_interface 의 base_schema_preserved (bool true) + base_schema_keys[] (5 entry) + extension_fields[] (new keys) + extension_field_marking ('OPTIONAL')
falsifiers_preregistered.mechanism: schema field check + grep noise_envelope.hexa current emit shape
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: base_schema_preserved == true AND base_schema_keys length == 5 AND extension_field_marking == 'OPTIONAL'

falsifiers_preregistered.name: origin-session-id-preservation-invariant
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: originSessionID 보존 invariant 명시 (3 단계): (a) noise-orchestrator (parent) 가 자신의 HIVE_PARENT_SID 또는 auto-synth SID 를 envelope.origin_session_id 에 기록; (b) rng-collab/sim-collab (child) 가 spawn 시 parent's origin_session_id 를 envelope payload 에 forward (자신의 새 SID 와 함께); (c) downstream consumer (kick_dispatch writeback) 가 origin_session_id 를 absorbed primitive 의 trawl_id 와 cross-link. 3 단계 누락 또는 'invariant' (origin_session_id 가 chain 전체에서 동일) 미명시 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: origin_session_id_preservation_chain length == 3 AND chain_invariant contains 'identical' OR 'same' OR 'preserved'

axis_a.rationale: 본 axis 는 '3 subagent (rng-collab / sim-collab / noise-orchestrator) 의 contract + raw 44 parent_sid streaming 의 3-stage propagation + originSessionID preservation invariant + multiplexer interface 의 backward-compat' 를 책임. axis_b (entropy domain multiplexer) 와 직교 — 본 axis 는 'who emits and how identity is carried', axis_b 는 'which source is selected and how fallback works'. axis_c (sim-output bridge expansion) 와 직교 — 본 axis 는 'subagent topology', axis_c 는 'gamma channel 의 catalog 후보'. correlation_estimate < 0.4. β-byte 35 mod 3 = 2 axis_c bias 였으나 architectural prerequisite 기준 본 axis 가 weight 1 — 다른 axis 의 contract surface 가 본 axis 에서 결정.

rng_collab.role: ANU QRNG hardware fetch (1 req/min budget)

sim_collab.role: Universe-sim output ingest (Gaia DR3 / IllustrisTNG / Millennium / Lattice QCD configurations)

noise_orchestrator.role: alpha emission + multiplexer fan-in + envelope validation + fallback ladder enforcement

axis_b.rationale: 본 axis 는 '3 entropy domain (quantum_hw / sim_output / system_csprng) 의 deterministic fallback ladder + per-source health check spec' 를 책임. axis_a (collab-orchestration) 와 직교 — 본 axis 는 'source selection logic', axis_a 는 'subagent identity 전달'. axis_c (sim-output bridge candidates) 와 부분 overlap (sim_output domain 이 axis_c 의 후보를 consume) 하나 본 axis 는 'fallback transition logic' 만 책임 — '어느 catalog 인가' 는 axis_c 에서 결정. correlation_estimate axis_b↔axis_c = 0.5 (overlap 실재 surface 정직 보고).

fallback_ladder_concrete.ladder_design_principle: 고-entropy 출처 가장 먼저, 가용성 보장 출처 마지막. quantum_hw (이론상 true randomness) → sim_output (deterministic but high-dimensional + scientifically-grounded) → system_csprng (always-available baseline).

axis_b.health_check_design_principle: 각 source 마다 (probe_method, success_criterion, failure_criterion, fallback_target) — failure_criterion 은 ALL conditions OR'd, success_criterion 은 ALL conditions AND'd

axis_c.rationale: 본 axis 는 'γ bridge 의 sim-output 확장 — 어떤 universe-simulation catalog 를 bridge 후보로 등록할 것인가, 각 후보의 record-shape + fetch latency + access note' 를 책임. axis_a (collab-orchestration) 와 직교 — 본 axis 는 'gamma channel candidate inventory', axis_a 는 'subagent emission protocol'. axis_b 와 부분 overlap (correlation 0.5 — sim_output domain 의 source 선택). γ envelope (Gaia bridge) 가 본 axis 의 motivating prior — Gaia 는 'real catalog' 의 archetype, sim_output bridge 후보는 'simulated catalog' 동형. β-byte 35 mod 3 = 2 → 본 axis 가 design-bias 후보 (entropy 보고).
axis_c.candidate_bridge_design_principle: 각 candidate 마다 (sim_name, output_artifact_kind, sample_record_shape, fetch_latency_estimate, license_or_access_note) — fetch_latency_estimate 는 OFFLINE-FALLBACK 가능 여부 + 실 fetch 시 RTT order; license_or_access_note 는 public/registration/restricted 분류

fan_out.correlation_estimate: axis_a↔axis_b = 0.35 (subagent topology 와 source selection 은 일부 cross-cut — orchestrator 가 fallback ladder 책임) / axis_a↔axis_c = 0.25 (subagent contract vs catalog 후보 거의 무관) / axis_b↔axis_c = 0.50 (sim_output domain 이 axis_c candidate 를 consume — 명시적 overlap; 0.7 미만은 유지) — 모든 pair < 0.7

promotion_gate.criterion: F1 (3 subagent contract 7-key) + F2 (parent_sid 3-stage propagation + originSessionID forwarding) + F3 (3 entropy domain fallback ladder + transition criteria) + F4 (per-source health check 4-tuple × 3) + F5 (sim-output bridge candidates ≥3 × 5-tuple) + F6 (multiplexer interface backward-compat) + F7 (originSessionID 3-stage preservation chain + invariant) 7/7 PASS 시 collab-orchestration + entropy-domain-multiplexer + sim-output-bridge-expansion 3 axis 각각 tier-1 promotion 1건 (총 3) 발급.
promotion_gate.result: F1-F7 7/7 PASS — tier-1 promotion 3건 emit (axis 별 1건)

core_5_op_kernel.witness_emit: this JSON file at /Users/ghost/core/nexus/design/kick//2026-04-27_noise-envelope-quantum-rng-universe-simulation-3-way-collab-_omega_cycle.json (canonical witness path; tool/witness_emit.hexa --validate 호환)

axes_surfaced.name: Three subagent contracts + raw 44 parent_sid streaming + originSessionID preservation + multiplexer backward-compat
options_considered: A. 'monolithic noise_envelope.hexa — subagent fan-out 없음, 모든 channel 을 한 process 에서 emit' (rejected: ANU API 1 req/min budget 이 main process latency 에 cost 를 부과 — drill_batch 같은 hot-path consumer 가 매 cycle 5s timeout 위험; sim-output ingest 도 cosmological catalog fetch 시 GB-order data — main process blocking 부적절)

B. '2-subagent fan-out — rng-collab + sim-collab 만, noise-orchestrator 는 monolithic 유지' (rejected: alpha channel 도 absorbed-pool selection 에 sim seed 흡수 logic 결합 → orchestrator 자체가 alpha-emission 책임 + multiplexer fan-in 책임 → 별도 contract 가 필요; 2-subagent 는 alpha channel 의 multiplexer responsibility 미surface)

C. '3-subagent fan-out — rng-collab + sim-collab + noise-orchestrator (parent for both)' (chosen: 각 channel 의 latency budget 분리 + raw 44 parent_sid streaming 의 자연 instantiation; orchestrator 가 fan-in 으로 alpha 만 직접 emit + child output validate + 3-channel jsonl finalize; 각 subagent 가 자체 health check 책임)

D. '5+ subagent — channel 별 + health check 별 + fallback 전환 별 분리' (rejected: subagent overhead (HIVE_PARENT_SID minting + fifo relay + slot allocation) 가 5x → drill cycle 의 latency budget 무력화; 3 가 minimal viable parallel decomposition)
axes_surfaced.decision: C — 3-subagent fan-out (rng-collab + sim-collab + noise-orchestrator). orchestrator 가 alpha + multiplexer fan-in + 3-channel finalize 책임, child 는 각 single-channel emit 책임.
axes_surfaced.rationale: α envelope (config-ts-port-roi noise_envelope_audit_chain prior-tier1) 의 'audit-chain primitive 가 alpha 출처' 패턴 동형 — orchestrator 가 alpha 직접 emit 하니 audit-chain 책임도 자연스럽게 orchestrator 에 집중. 3-subagent 는 raw 44 parent_sid streaming 의 minimal viable instantiation (parent + 2 child) — kick_dispatch.hexa:901,912,1018-1029 의 3-stage propagation 이 그대로 적용. β-byte 35 (mod 3 = 2) 는 axis_c bias 였으나 architectural prerequisite 으로 본 axis 가 우선순위 — 다른 axis 가 본 axis 의 contract surface 위에서 정의됨.

axes_surfaced.name: Three entropy domain fallback ladder + per-source health check spec
options_considered: A. 'flat 1-domain — system_csprng only (urandom)' (rejected: 본 cycle 의 핵심 promise 가 quantum_hw + sim_output 추가 — 1-domain 으로 회귀는 cycle 의 의미 부정; 또한 raw 47 outside-the-well claim 약화)

B. '2-domain — quantum_hw + system_csprng (sim_output 제외)' (rejected: 현재 noise_envelope.hexa 가 정확히 이 형태 — 본 cycle 의 추가 promise 인 sim_output 제외 시 차별화 0; gamma channel 이 bridge 만 emit, sim_output 가 entropy domain 으로 격상되지 않음)

C. '3-domain — quantum_hw / sim_output / system_csprng + deterministic fallback ladder + per-source health check' (chosen: 본 cycle topic 의 직접 instantiation; ladder priority high→low 가 entropy density 와 가용성의 자연 trade-off; health check 가 각 transition 의 deterministic trigger)
D. 'N-domain plug-in — domain registry + plugin interface' (rejected: scope 외 — 본 cycle 은 3 fixed domain 의 제일 분명한 instantiation 책임; plugin interface 는 후속 cycle 위임)
axes_surfaced.decision: C — 3-domain (quantum_hw / sim_output / system_csprng) deterministic fallback ladder + per-source health check (probe_method, success_criterion, failure_criterion, fallback_target) 4-tuple.
axes_surfaced.rationale: β envelope (urandom-fallback witnessed, obs_2) 의 'QRNG-PREFERRED-WITH-URANDOM-FALLBACK' 패턴 직접 확장 — 2-step ladder 를 3-step 으로 확장 + 각 step 의 transition criteria 명시. health check spec 은 raw 73 deterministic verifier 패턴 동형 — 'subjective 가용성' 이 아닌 'probe 결과 + AND/OR 조건식' 으로 ladder transition 결정. 거짓 ground 0 보존 — sim_output 가 'OFFLINE-FALLBACK 가능' 명시는 sim catalog 미설치 환경의 정직 surface.

axes_surfaced.name: Gamma bridge sim-output candidate inventory + record-shape + access note
options_considered: A. 'sim_output 미확장 — 기존 16 bridge (Gaia/CMB/CODATA/...) 만 사용' (rejected: 본 cycle 의 핵심 promise 가 sim_output bridge — 미확장은 cycle 의 의미 부정; γ channel 이 'real catalog' 만 다루면 sim 출처와 cross-link 불가)
B. '1 sim_output candidate — Gaia mock catalog 만' (rejected: 1 candidate 는 raw 47 outside-the-well claim 약화; sim catalog 다양성 (cosmological / particle physics / molecular) 미반영)

C. '≥3 sim_output candidate — IllustrisTNG (cosmological N-body) + MillenniumXXL (halo catalog) + Lattice QCD configuration ensemble (particle physics)' (chosen: 3 distinct domain — galactic dynamics / large-scale-structure / strong-force lattice — orthogonal scientific fields, 각각 자체 record-shape + fetch latency 분포; raw 47 cross-repo-trawl-witness 강화)
D. '5+ candidate (Bolshoi, Magneticum, EAGLE, FLAMINGO, ...)' (rejected: 본 cycle 은 design-time inventory — implementation-time 에 후보 추가 가능; 3 가 minimal viable diversity, 5+ 는 본 cycle 의 책임 외)
axes_surfaced.decision: C — 3 sim_output candidate (IllustrisTNG + MillenniumXXL + Lattice QCD ensemble). 각 5-tuple (sim_name, output_artifact_kind, sample_record_shape, fetch_latency_estimate, license_or_access_note).
axes_surfaced.rationale: γ envelope (Gaia bridge) 의 'astrometry catalog with quantified error-budget per record' 패턴 동형 확장 — sim catalog 도 (object_id, attribute, attribute_error|value_distribution) 같은 record-shape 보유. β-byte 35 (mod 3 = 2) 가 본 axis 의 design-bias 와 정합 — entropy 가 sim-output 확장 weight 를 시사. 거짓 ground 0 — license_or_access_note 에 'public download' / 'registration required' / 'collaboration access' 분류로 약화 surface 정직 보고.

tier_1_promotions.rationale: noise envelope multiplexer 의 collab-orchestration axis 를 (a) 3 subagent contract (rng-collab + sim-collab + noise-orchestrator) 7-key 명시; (b) raw 44 parent_sid streaming 3-stage propagation (env → flag → auto-synth) + originSessionID forwarding; (c) multiplexer interface backward-compat (5-key base schema preserve + 새 field OPTIONAL); (d) originSessionID preservation chain (3-stage) + invariant. F1+F2+F6+F7 = 4 falsifier 본 promotion 직속.

rng_collab.role_one_line: ANU QRNG hardware fetch with 1 req/min budget; emit β envelope only

exit_codes.2: ANU API 5s timeout (still PASS via urandom_fallback — exit 0; exit 2 reserved for unrecoverable IO)

rng_collab.parent_sid_handling: reads HIVE_PARENT_SID; if unset, fails with reason=parent-sid-required fix='spawn via noise-orchestrator (which auto-synths if needed)'
rng_collab.raw_44_compliance: child role — does NOT auto-synth own SID; depends on parent's SID stream. Forwards parent's origin_session_id into envelope.payload_summary.

sim_collab.name: sim-collab
sim_collab.role_one_line: Universe-sim catalog ingest (Gaia DR3 / IllustrisTNG mock / MillenniumXXL halo / Lattice QCD ensemble); emit γ envelope only
inputs_required: bridge_pick from registry (selected by orchestrator's β-byte mod 16)
OFFLINE-FALLBACK env gate (default ON until catalog availability verified)

exit_codes.3: bridge invocation script missing (e.g. tool/gaia_bridge.hexa not found) — fails closed

sim_collab.parent_sid_handling: same as rng_collab — child role, depends on parent's SID stream
sim_collab.raw_44_compliance: child role; forwards parent's origin_session_id into envelope.payload_summary; does NOT mint own SID.

noise_orchestrator.name: noise-orchestrator
noise_orchestrator.role_one_line: alpha emission (absorbed-pool pick) + spawn rng-collab/sim-collab as children + fan-in 3-envelope JSONL + multiplexer fallback ladder enforcement

exit_codes.2: rng-collab failed (ladder advances to system_csprng for β)
exit_codes.3: sim-collab failed (ladder advances to gamma OFFLINE-FALLBACK or skip)

noise_orchestrator.parent_sid_handling: parent role — reads HIVE_PARENT_SID; if unset, mints via tool/hive_parent_sid.hexa (kick-self-<unix>-<8hex>) or auto-synths 'auto-<slug>-<ts>-<pid>' (kick_dispatch.hexa:1025-1028 pattern)
noise_orchestrator.raw_44_compliance: parent role — passes own SID to children via env (HIVE_PARENT_SID export) + --parent-sid flag (belt-and-suspenders); records own SID as origin_session_id in alpha envelope and propagates to children's envelopes.

propagation_stages.name: child_inherit
propagation_stages.source: noise-orchestrator exports HIVE_PARENT_SID into rng-collab/sim-collab subprocess env + passes --parent-sid flag

origin_session_id_forwarding.mechanism: noise-orchestrator records own SID as 'origin_session_id' in alpha envelope.payload_summary (e.g. 'origin=kick-self-1745764778-0749b3c8'); when spawning rng-collab/sim-collab, exports both HIVE_PARENT_SID (= own SID) and ORIGIN_SESSION_ID (= identical, for clarity) into child env. Child reads ORIGIN_SESSION_ID and stamps into own envelope.payload_summary.
origin_session_id_forwarding.invariant: origin_session_id is identical across all 3 envelopes (alpha from orchestrator, beta from rng-collab, gamma from sim-collab) within a single run. This identity-preserving invariant enables downstream cross-link: kick_dispatch writeback can group 3 envelopes back into one fan-out tree.

multiplexer_interface.base_schema_evidence: tool/noise_envelope.hexa current emit shape — verified via Read of state/kick/runs/2026-04-27_noise-envelope-quantum-rng-universe-simulation-3-way-collab-/noise_envelopes.jsonl (3 lines, all 5-key)
extension_fields: subagent_sid (str — child's own SID, distinct from parent for rng/sim)
multiplexer_interface.backward_compat_rationale: 기존 sentinel parser (tool/witness_emit.hexa --validate) 가 5-key base 만 검증 — 새 OPTIONAL field 는 unknown-key tolerance 위에서 동작. 기존 absorbed/<...>.hexa writeback 도 base 5-key 만 사용 → 무영향.

origin_session_id_preservation_chain.action: mint or inherit SID; record in alpha envelope payload_summary as origin_session_id; export to child env
read ORIGIN_SESSION_ID from env; mint own subagent_sid; record BOTH origin_session_id (parent's) AND subagent_sid (own) in beta/gamma envelope payload_summary
parse 3 envelopes; cross-link via identical origin_session_id; group into one fan-out tree; if origin_session_id mismatch → reject as parity failure

axis_collab_orchestration.chain_invariant: origin_session_id is identical (preserved verbatim) across all 3 envelopes within a single run; subagent_sid differs per channel (alpha=orchestrator's own, beta=rng-collab's own, gamma=sim-collab's own); identity preservation enables deterministic downstream cross-link.

tier_1_promotions.rationale: noise envelope multiplexer 의 entropy-domain-multiplexer axis 를 (a) 3 domain (quantum_hw / sim_output / system_csprng) deterministic fallback ladder + transition criteria; (b) per-source health check 4-tuple (probe_method, success_criterion, failure_criterion, fallback_target). F3+F4 = 2 falsifier 본 promotion 직속.
tier_1_promotions.evidence: /Users/ghost/core/nexus/state/kick/registry/noise_sources/qrng/anu_time.hexa:11 (offline-fallback true) + :15 (rate-limit 1 req/min) + :19 (obs_2 reframe — QRNG-PREFERRED-WITH-URANDOM-FALLBACK) + tool/noise_envelope.hexa:165 (curl --max-time 5) + :188-190 (source='urandom_fallback' branch)

fallback_ladder.design_principle: 고-entropy 출처 가장 먼저, 가용성 보장 출처 마지막. quantum_hw (이론상 true randomness, but rate/network constrained) → sim_output (deterministic but high-dimensional + scientifically-grounded) → system_csprng (always-available baseline, OS guarantee).

transition_criteria.trigger: ANU API HTTP timeout (curl --max-time 5 exceeded) OR rate-limit (1 req/min) violated within current window OR HTTP non-200
sim catalog file mtime > 24h stale OR sim catalog file missing OR checksum mismatch OR OFFLINE-FALLBACK env explicitly unset and bridge invocation script not found
DIRECT 2-step skip — sim_output unavailable AND quantum_hw failed; bypass ladder middle. Default behavior when both probe_method (a) + (b) FAIL within single cycle.

fallback_ladder.steady_state_default_in_2026_04_environm: system_csprng (because KICK_BETA_REAL_ANU 미설정 + sim_collab 미배포) — 본 cycle 의 정직 surface: ladder 정의 했으나 production 에서는 step-3 (system_csprng) 가 dominant

quantum_hw.failure_criterion: (http_code != '200') OR (timeout 5s exceeded) OR (response body 'success' != true) OR (rate-limit window reached: previous probe within 60s)

sim_output.success_criterion: (file exists) AND (mtime within last 24h OR catalog marked 'static-snapshot' in registry) AND (checksum matches expected hash from registry-of-record)
sim_output.failure_criterion: (file missing) OR (mtime > 24h AND not static-snapshot) OR (checksum mismatch) OR (bridge invocation script tool/<bridge>.hexa missing)

system_csprng.success_criterion: (/dev/urandom readable) — OS guarantee, true except in stripped chroot/container
system_csprng.failure_criterion: (/dev/urandom unreadable) — extreme edge case (chroot without /dev mount); orchestrator fails closed with exit 1
system_csprng.fallback_target: NONE — terminal step in ladder; if csprng fails, entire cycle fails (no further fallback meaningful)

axis_entropy_domain_multiplexer.ladder_transition_log_format: noise-orchestrator stdout emits __LADDER_TRANSITION__ from=<step> to=<step> trigger=<criterion-key> ts=<ISO8601> per transition; structured for downstream chi-square analysis (G5 bench from prior cycle) of fallback frequency

tier_1_promotions.rationale: noise envelope multiplexer 의 sim-output-bridge-expansion axis 를 ≥3 sim catalog candidate × 5-tuple (sim_name, output_artifact_kind, sample_record_shape, fetch_latency_estimate, license_or_access_note) 로 inventory. F5 = 1 falsifier 본 promotion 직속.
tier_1_promotions.evidence: /Users/ghost/core/nexus/state/kick/registry/noise_sources/bridges/gaia.hexa (existing real-catalog archetype: source-tag gaia, invocation tool/gaia_bridge.hexa, offline-fallback true) — 본 cycle 은 'simulated catalog' 동형 확장

candidate_bridges.sim_name: IllustrisTNG (TNG100 / TNG300 / TNG50 mock galaxy catalogs)
candidate_bridges.output_artifact_kind: snapshot HDF5 — galaxy properties (subhalo mass, position, velocity, stellar metallicity) per snapshot
candidate_bridges.sample_record_shape: {subhalo_id: int64, snapshot: int (0-99), pos_xyz: float32[3] (cMpc/h), vel_xyz: float32[3] (km/s), mass_stellar: float32 (M_sun/h), mass_dm: float32, sfr: float32 (M_sun/yr), metallicity: float32}
candidate_bridges.fetch_latency_estimate: REGISTRATION-required (tng-project.org); single subhalo record ~100 bytes after extraction; full snapshot 10-100 GB; OFFLINE-FALLBACK 가능 if local snapshot present (대안: TNG public catalog API ~1-3s per query, registration token required)
candidate_bridges.license_or_access_note: public after registration (free academic access; tng-project.org/data/); citation required (Springel et al. 2018, Pillepich et al. 2018)

candidate_bridges.output_artifact_kind: halo finder output (FoF + SUBFIND) — dark matter halo properties (mass, radius, position, spin) at 64 snapshots
candidate_bridges.sample_record_shape: {halo_id: int64, snapshot: int (0-63), redshift: float32, pos_xyz: float64[3] (cMpc/h), m_vir: float64 (M_sun/h), r_vir: float32 (kpc/h), v_max: float32 (km/s), spin: float32}
candidate_bridges.fetch_latency_estimate: RESTRICTED (collaboration access only, http://www.millennium-simulation.org/data/); per-record fetch via SQL-like API ~1-5s; OFFLINE-FALLBACK 가능 only if collaboration data present locally; default OFFLINE
candidate_bridges.license_or_access_note: collaboration-restricted (Virgo Consortium); request access via http://www.millennium-simulation.org/access/; non-commercial research only

candidate_bridges.sim_name: Lattice QCD configuration ensembles (e.g. MILC, RBC/UKQCD, JLQCD)
candidate_bridges.output_artifact_kind: gauge configuration files — SU(3) link variables on 4D lattice (typical 32^3 × 64 sites × 4 directions × 9 complex matrix elements)
candidate_bridges.sample_record_shape: {ensemble_id: str (e.g. 'a09m310'), config_id: int, beta: float, m_l: float, m_s: float, lattice_size: str ('32x32x32x64'), file_size_GB: float (~5-50 per config), gauge_type: str ('Wilson'|'Asqtad'|'HISQ'|'DWF')}
candidate_bridges.fetch_latency_estimate: RESTRICTED (USQCD / ILDG access; gauge configs 5-50 GB per file); single config download ~hours over standard network; OFFLINE-FALLBACK 가능 if local ensemble subset present; OPTIMAL: only metadata record (~kB) from ILDG XML catalog as bridge byte source
candidate_bridges.license_or_access_note: registration required (ILDG: International Lattice Data Grid, https://ildg.sasr.edu.au/); collaboration-specific terms; USQCD-collaborated configs usually citation-only

candidate_bridges.sim_name: BONUS: Gaia DR3 Universe Model (Robin et al. — synthetic stars catalog mimicking real Gaia survey)
candidate_bridges.output_artifact_kind: synthetic Gaia-like catalog — same record shape as real Gaia DR3 but generated by Galactic dynamics model
candidate_bridges.sample_record_shape: {source_id: int64, ra: float64, dec: float64, parallax: float32 (mas), pmra: float32 (mas/yr), pmdec: float32 (mas/yr), radial_velocity: float32, phot_g_mean_mag: float32, model_age: float32, model_metallicity: float32}
candidate_bridges.fetch_latency_estimate: PUBLIC (via Gaia archive https://gea.esac.esa.int/archive/); per-record fetch via TAP/ADQL ~1-3s; OFFLINE-FALLBACK 가능 with bulk download; mirror-image of real Gaia bridge — minimal new infrastructure
candidate_bridges.license_or_access_note: public (CC-BY 4.0 ESA); attribution required (Robin et al. + Gaia Collaboration)

axis_sim_output_bridge_expansion.registry_extension_proposal: state/kick/registry/noise_sources/bridges/{illustristng_subhalo,millenniumxxl_halo,lattice_qcd_ildg,gaia_universe_model}.hexa — 각 file 가 indented key/value DSL (kind=sim_catalog 추가 — 기존 enum {bridge, qrng, absorbed} → {bridge, qrng, absorbed, sim_catalog}); sim-collab 가 kind=sim_catalog entry 만 consume
